SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-28-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KUNIS'S CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RUSIAN HONCHAR (REPRESENTATIVE, OFFICER). DEFENDANT BOWER'S TRUCKING, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. THE RETURN CERTIFIED PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT VALID. THE CORRECT AGENT ADDRESS FOR SERVICE WAS SERVED BUT THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT INDICATED ON THE GREEN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD. PLIANTIFF'S CLAIM NEEDS TO BE RESERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
